ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the customer */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job type of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "default_status" TEXT /* Default status of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the bank */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact for the customer */,
  "income_level" REAL /* Income level of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "is_vip" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a VIP */,
  "language_preferences" TEXT /* Language preferences of the customer */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., high net worth, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the campaign is associated with */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Contact method used for the campaign */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the campaign */,
  "poutcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the previous campaign */,
  "ageTran" REAL /* Transformed age */,
  "dayTran" REAL /* Transformed day */,
  "durTran" REAL /* Transformed duration */,
  "campaign" INTEGER /* Number of campaigns */,
  "pdays" INTEGER /* Days passed after the last campaign */,
  "previous" INTEGER /* Number of previous campaigns */,
  "assetIndex" REAL /* Asset index */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign */,
  "marketing_channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the outcome */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the outcome */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was recorded */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, marketing manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role name */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
